testcase.name: test_send_returns_clean_400_when_gmail_disconnected

failure.message: AssertionError: expected clean 4xx, got 500: Internal Server Error assert 500 != 500 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter69_whatsapp_qr_gmail400.py:211: in test_send_returns_clean_400_when_gmail_disconnected assert r.status_code != 500, f"expected clean 4xx, got 500: {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: expected clean 4xx, got 500: Internal Server Error E assert 500 != 500 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
